uplink.description: Davis weather report (ReportData 0x0B, sub 2, selector 0x00). Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected physical values cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (decoder-weather.js parseWeather): barometric pressure 29.915 inHg -> 1013.0 hPa, outside temperature 77.0 degF -> 25.00 degC, wind speed 10 mph -> 4.47 m/s, 10-min avg 8 mph -> 3.58 m/s, wind direction 245 deg, humidity 55 %, rain rate 5 tips -> 1.0 mm/h, UV index 3, solar radiation 650 W/m2, day rain 23 tips -> 4.6 mm.
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (parseWeather) and normalizing to vocabulary units (inHg->hPa, degF->degC, mph->m/s, 0.2mm tips->mm). Upstream emits stringified, locale/unit-mixed values; we emit numbers in vocabulary units.

uplink.description: Particulate-only report (ReportData 0x0B, sub 2, selector 0x01). Synthetic frame with a timestamp and PM1/PM2.5/PM10 (ug/m3); cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js parsePM (pm1=12, pm25=8, pm10=20). Timestamp 2026-06-15T09:42:30Z.
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; PM values match reference/upstream-codec.js parsePM. PM1 has no vocabulary key so dust is emitted as camelCase extras pm1/pm2_5/pm10. Upstream formats the timestamp with new Date().toLocaleString() (locale-dependent); we emit a deterministic UTC RFC3339 time from the same packed-timestamp bits.

uplink.description: Combined T/RH/pressure + particulate report with battery (ReportData 0x0B, sub 3, selector 0x00). Synthetic frame; cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js parseTERPM: temperature 25.45 degC, humidity 55.0 %, pressure 1013.00 hPa, PM1/PM2.5/PM10 = 12/8/20 ug/m3, battery 88 %. Timestamp 2026-06-15T09:42:30Z.
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; T/RH/pressure/PM/battery match reference/upstream-codec.js parseTERPM. Battery is a percentage so it maps to the camelCase extra batteryPercent (vocabulary battery is volts). Time is emitted as deterministic UTC RFC3339.

uplink.description: Unsupported ReportData frame (0x0B with an unknown sub-type/selector combination) is rejected with an error.
uplink._note: Synthetic error case: sub-type nibble 1 with selector 0xff is not a frame this device emits. Chosen instead of a foreign uplink id (e.g. 0x09 metering) because that path lives in a separate upstream decoder file not present in this snapshot.
